transcript:
My name is Vidor, I'm the co-founder of Solflare. And uh, I'm incredibly excited to make Solflare's biggest announcement to date at the biggest Breakpoint to date. I hope you're ready. I want to talk about something uh, that sounds, feels, and in many ways is... Magic. But not the kind of magic that hides complexity, or more the kind of a magic that removes it.

When you think about crypto and open financial systems, they evolve much faster than traditional financial systems and unlike them, we don't have the luxury of all that time to sort of wait things to settle or integrate these things. Uh, wallets and dApps are forced to hardcode flows every day and then every other week is sort of everything changed. So, it's not sustainable. Every new feature needs to become a new integration, then every integration adds more complexity. And what we get at the end is an app that looks just bloated. So, Solflare therefore must integrate emerging things at super high speed but without sacrificing any of the user experience. Because if we sacrifice user experience just users gonna leave.

Try reading this sentence: "Every month, buy SOL with 5% of my income and lend it for interest." This sentence is incredibly easy to say. But if you try doing this inside of a wallet, you're gonna be faced with these like rigid interfaces, hardcoded flows, multiple screens, financial language that you don't really need to know. And the time from when you want to do something, so the time from intent to execution is just way too long. Imagine in an even simpler example. Imagine if you want to wake up at 7am on odd days and 8am on even days. Language is beautifully simple and things are easy to say, but in an alarm app you would still need like 20 clicks or something insane.

Crypto shouldn't force you to learn a new language. And when this gets combined with the ongoing requirement of discovery, this adds like the friction compounds and users aren't really able to discover new opportunities efficiently enough. There's this amazing stat that only 6% of Solflare users use DeFi protocols. And this is not because they don't want to or because there isn't any value there. But because discovery is overwhelming. People don't have the time or mental bandwidth to constantly research, compare, monitor everything. In this attention economy that we live in, uh, anything that requires effort simply doesn't happen. So, if this is the problem, what actually uh fixes this?

Many people think the answer is just AI. Yes, AI is powerful, but AI alone is not not the product. It only solves half of the problem. On one side, we have these probabilistic systems, LLMs, and they are incredible at understanding language, context, intent. And on the other side we have these deterministic intent-based architectures. Because finance inherently is deterministic, it's precise, it's verifiable. And finance cannot be executed probabilistically. So if you let AI do everything, then you sort of risk to break trust. If you ignore AI completely, you break UX.

What is the solution here? The real breakthrough happens when these worlds come together. When you combine them, a completely new paradigm of wallets is unlocked. Some tried letting LLMs do everything, that broke finance, others stayed fully deterministic, that totally broke UX, made it super painful. And Magic, as we call it right now, uh lives in the balance in between of these two. And this is how the idea of Magic was born.

So be prepared for a bold statement. In the future we believe users won't interact with smart contracts directly. They will express intents, either orally or verbally, written or in any other ways. Wallets will then be in charge for orchestrating everything behind the scenes. And the network of solvers will compete to fulfill those intents. The wallet as such becomes the distribution layer for the whole ecosystem. We already see this and developers every day ask us to get distribution through Solflare. But unfortunately we cannot integrate everyone manually, it's super painful. And dApp browsers, let's face it, broken experience. And Magic changes that. Uh, with this, with this sort of uh, crypto changes or Solflare changes to Solflare UX changes to being everything everywhere all at once. Uh, a new wallet architecture that adapts as fast as crypto evolves.

So for all of the tech people really quickly, uh, obviously we uh, I'm gonna walk you through a high level uh diagram here. It all starts with a conversational UI that in natural language accepts intent. It gets routed to this uh AI agent engine that is in charge for untangling and enriching these intents. Also routing. Then if we sort of recognize those intents as some of the things that Solflare already does today, we implemented some interactive plugins for sending, swapping, staking, all the usual wallet stuff. And for others that our wallet today cannot solve for, gets routed through to the intent solver network, through our wallet core. And then intent solvers are essentially able to bid on fulfilling these intents. It all goes through uh our Solflare wallet core and we have Solflare Guards embedded inside of it which uh provides runtime execution guarantees. On the way up, uh when the result of this intent goes back to the AI agent engine, we also use it to use AI LLMs to generate UI and to generate uh unified dashboard where you can see all of your positions and everything that you ever did or everything that's actual uh for you. So, I'm gonna play a quick video.

[Video plays]

You probably saw some wild stuff there. Conditional orders, uh tracking market sentiment, advanced uh technical indicators, uh or uh like putting it to sort of a more exploratory role like figure out where the best yield. Videos are cool but you know what's cooler? Uh, yeah, a demo. So let's let's quickly do this. I'm gonna open my like Solflare wallet here. Uh, I'm gonna click on the Magic tab here. Uh, I have a cheat code for uh what I wanna show you guys, so it's gonna be prompt one. So if SOL, if buy one SOL if its price goes up by 0.1 dollar or drops by 0.1 dollar. I'm gonna hit enter. It's gonna generate all the orders for me. Uh, it's gonna parse all the intent. I'm gonna quickly uh sign that transaction. Click, click, click. It's done, approved. Uh, I'm gonna... internet doesn't work but hey, uh here are the repeating orders on uh uh that just happened. There's uh one more thing that I can I can also quickly show you. I have uh it's called prompt two.

So every Sunday evening, sell one SOL if it's above 250, buy one SOL if it's under 100. Uh, it creates these recurring orders that are conditioned. Uh, the dashboard is gonna show you how uh how many times they already executed. Uh, you also confirm transactions, pre-approve. Uh, is it self-custodial? It has notification spending so you can see I just created two more recurring orders. You can create one-off orders, you can create price alerts. And that's that's the short demo. I know you guys love demos. Uh, maybe back to the slides quickly.

Okay, so I have three call to actions for you guys. One, uh be amazed by what Magic is today and what Magic will be in the future. Two, uh Magic is live today in a private alpha setting. We've let in our some of the power users inside. You can get access codes, just find our team members, we're gonna let you in. And uh you can go to ai.solflare.com for the waitlist. And if you're a developer, dApp protocol that wants to sort of get the Solflare distribution through Magic, you can go to developers.solflare.com or scan this QR code and then we can work together on getting you inside of uh Magic. So, that's it. Thanks everyone.

editorial.headline: Solflare Launches 'Magic' to Automate DeFi Strategies via AI Intents
editorial.standfirst: The leading Solana wallet debuts a hybrid architecture combining LLMs with a solver network, aiming to unlock DeFi liquidity for the 94% of users currently sidelined by complexity.
key_takeaways: Solflare unveiled **Solflare Magic**, a new wallet architecture that translates natural language into verifiable on-chain execution.
The product addresses a critical adoption bottleneck: currently, only **6% of Solflare users** engage with DeFi protocols due to UX friction.
A **Private Alpha** is live today, introducing an 'Intent Solver Network' where developers and protocols compete to fulfill user requests.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
At Solana Breakpoint 2025, **Solflare** Co-Founder Vidor Gencel introduced a paradigm shift in wallet architecture designed to solve the chronic fragmentation of crypto user experience. Dubbed **Solflare Magic**, the new feature set moves beyond static, hardcoded interfaces to a dynamic, intent-based system. Gencel argued that the current model—where every new protocol requires a bespoke UI integration—is unsustainable and results in "bloated" applications that deter users. He cited internal data revealing that despite high wallet activity, only **6% of users** interact with DeFi protocols, a discrepancy attributed entirely to the cognitive load of discovery and execution.

The technical architecture of Magic attempts to reconcile two conflicting systems: the probabilistic nature of Large Language Models (LLMs) and the deterministic rigidity of financial smart contracts. While AI excels at parsing intent from natural language (e.g., "Buy SOL if it drops by $0.10"), it cannot be trusted to execute financial transactions directly due to hallucinations. Solflare’s solution is a hybrid engine: an AI layer interprets the user's verbal or written request and routes it through **Solflare Guards**, a security layer that ensures runtime execution guarantees. This allows the wallet to generate UI on the fly while maintaining cryptographic trust.

For institutional investors and developers, the introduction of the **Intent Solver Network** represents a new distribution channel. Rather than users manually navigating to specific dApps, the wallet acts as an orchestration layer. Users express an intent, and a network of solvers competes to fulfill that request efficiently. This creates a market structure where the wallet becomes the primary distribution layer for the ecosystem. The system is currently live in a **Private Alpha**, with waitlist access available at ai.solflare.com.
